overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a foggy night in Saint Denis. The player character walks through narrow wooden streets before mounting a horse and riding through the town as heavy rain begins to fall, eventually arriving at the train station.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy street with wooden buildings and tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy narrow street between wooden frontier buildings

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier building with balconies and shuttered windows
wooden structure with awnings and signage
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
cast iron street lamps emitting warm orange light
overhanging wooden balcony structures on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a narrow foggy street in an old west town at night. The camera moves forward between closely packed wooden buildings with tram tracks running down the center of the cobblestone road. Warm gas lamps pierce the thick fog, creating an atmospheric, enclosed environment with no other characters visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: town intersection with green-painted building ahead

events.description: narrow street opens into wider intersection with green building visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward a pedestrian standing in the street ahead near the green building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the street toward the camera before moving aside

entered.detail: distinctive two-story building with green painted facade and covered porch
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The street widens into a more open intersection, revealing a distinctive green building ahead. A pedestrian walks in the street toward the camera. The fog persists but the sky becomes partially visible above the buildings. Wooden structures line the right side while the left opens up slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with tram tracks and brick buildings

events.description: character mounts horse and begins riding through the town
heavy rain begins to fall suddenly reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: riding horseback through the town center passing other mounted riders

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall multi-story brick building with arched windows and warm interior lighting
suspended lamp hanging over the street illuminating the tracks below

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to horseback riding as the camera follows the mounted character through wider streets. The architecture transitions to brick buildings on the right with ornate windows. Other riders pass by as the camera moves steadily forward. At the end of the segment, heavy rain suddenly begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy town street approaching train station

events.description: passing horse-drawn carriage moving along the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: riding through heavy rain passing a horse-drawn carriage and approaching the station

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the street

entered.detail: large building with green roof and clock tower marking the train station

segments.scene_description: Riding through heavy rain with water visible falling and reflecting on the cobblestones. A horse-drawn carriage passes on the left. The train station building becomes visible ahead with its distinctive green roof and tower. The brick buildings on the right draw closer as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: saint denis train station platform and roof structure

events.description: camera ascends to elevated position revealing station roof and SAINT DENIS sign
steam train approaches the station with bright headlight visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: moving to elevated vantage point on the station roof to observe the approaching train

entered.detail: large metal and glass station canopy with SAINT DENIS signage visible
steam locomotive with bright headlight approaching on the tracks
covered platform area with columns and benches

segments.scene_description: Arriving at Saint Denis train station, the camera ascends to an elevated position on the station roof, revealing the large SAINT DENIS sign and the glass canopy structure. A steam train approaches on the tracks with its headlight cutting through the rainy night. The view encompasses the station platforms and surrounding city buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a foggy night town that transitions from narrow, enclosed alleys into wider, rain-swept streets. It begins on a cobblestone road between closely packed wooden buildings, where warm gas lamps pierce a thick fog surrounding central tram tracks. As the camera advances, the street widens into an open intersection featuring a distinctive green building and a lone pedestrian, while the sky becomes partially visible above the rooftops. The perspective then shifts to a mounted ride through broader thoroughfares, where the wooden structures give way to ornate brick architecture and other riders pass by. The scene finally culminates as the camera moves steadily forward and heavy rain suddenly begins to fall across the town.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked city street that ascends into a panoramic view of a bustling train station. It begins with a ride through heavy rain, where water falls across reflecting cobblestones and a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. As the camera advances past brick buildings, the train station emerges ahead with its distinctive green roof and tower. The scene then shifts upward, ascending to an elevated position on the station roof to reveal the large Saint Denis sign and the expansive glass canopy. Finally, the perspective opens across the platforms and surrounding city buildings as a steam train approaches, its headlight cutting through the rainy night.
